[Request]
Most expensive product in each category. For each category, show the most expensive product and its price

1. [gpt-4o]

Query:
SELECT p.category_id, p.product_name, p.price
FROM products p
JOIN (
    SELECT category_id, MAX(price) AS max_price
    FROM products
    GROUP BY category_id
) max_prices ON p.category_id = max_prices.category_id AND p.price = max_prices.max_price;

Query:
SELECT categories.category_name, products.product_name, products.price
FROM categories
JOIN products ON categories.category_id = products.category_id
JOIN (
    SELECT products.category_id AS category_id, MAX(products.price) AS max_price
    FROM products
    GROUP BY products.category_id
) max_prices ON products.category_id = max_prices.category_id AND products.price = max_prices.max_price
ORDER BY categories.category_name;
